text.message: Red... You were too slow lol
You got something against me blue?
When oj racing army and has considerably more pips of production?
You have what I need, aren't trading, and are tied for the lead
I am not in the lead. Oj has 2 devs over me
think it's clear cut oj rob
I don't play the extortion game
Blue I swear you also robbed red lol
The table talk is op red
id do this if you ddint block my 6
I need more than just my card back
Idk black. I think two robs was harsh. Oj has better production, and ore, and had two devs on me. I think it is obvious who has the better setup. Even if I wasn’t trading 1 round, it was a mistake
I'm in the lead I think
Black, you robbed oj only after two opportunities where you needed to slow him down
it was when you double robbed red
The rolls have gone ojs way
You're the one who left the 8 3 4 open
black that’s not the only reason and you should have known that
nah it was when you did that it's ok you didnt see it
Nah... I hate all those numbers
Just going to be that guy and point out I don't get road or army
I’ve done 2:1s on my turn to you blue just btw
Red that trade is unreal for you lol
It’s a shame oj is doing so bad
To stop blacks double play it is needed
Okay I’m just muting him lmao
Lol I'm just trying to have some fun
No he’s known he’s been in the lead this whole time
Not that serious. I'm obviously in the lead all good
He even knew when I got robbed in the beginning
Not the whole time but since ore rolling yeh
I was just surprised black didn’t see it tbh
I didnt know your play style was a combo of not extorting and robbing me lol
He was on 7 why would he knight lol
Don’t pass until you get a knight
holding army is much more important
Oj. From an objective standpoint. Was that a mistake on blacks part?
game was scuffed from the start
I can't home army without production
You want to offer production help them fine
i take a weaker setup hoping i dont get targeted, but get targeted anyway while oj has clear best setup
To not force cards out of you all so he does both city and pop yes
He should've pushed you to hand over the juice
I specifically told him not to pass until he got a knight
Ok... I may get army guys... I've had a change of heart
Although I back red to mono gg here
Yes right the mono I have
